Part.Source: Event Start loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FiLCod = &Context.FilCod RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, DomConfSistema.TCon148_ControleLote, &TCon148_ControleLote) TableMsg.Visible = false &Mensagem = '' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' &EmpCod.Visible = False &FilCod.Visible = False &tmpNFeCod.Visible = False &tmpEmixCod.Visible = False Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &DeOndeVem = &WizardData.SelecionarXML.DeOndeVem If &DeOndeVem.IsEmpty() Dashboard.Link() EndIF &NomeTemporario = &DeOndeVem.Trim() + 'IMPXMLCOMPRA' + trim(str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) + '-' &tmpNFeCod = &NomeTemporario + '1' do 'loadTemporaria' EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. &tmpProRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' tmpProSolLot.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount EndEvent Event Grid.Load &tmpProRef = tmpProRef &tmpEntCFOP = tmpEntCFOP &ProSts = RetornaStatusProduto.udp(&EmpCod, tmpProCod) &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = tmpProQtdCmpEmb if &tmpProQtdCmpEmb < 0 &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = &tmpProQtdCmpEmb*-1 Endif &tmpProQtdCmpEmbVarchar = toformattedString(&tmpProQtdCmpEmb) &tmpPedQtdVarchar = toformattedString(tmpPedQtd) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&tmpPedQtdVarchar, &tmpPedQtdVarchar) If tmpProQtdCmpEmb <> 0 and tmpProQtdCmpEmb <> 1 RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&tmpProQtdCmpEmbVarchar, &tmpProQtdCmpEmbVarchar) if tmpProQtdCmpEmb > 0 &tmpPedQtd = tmpProQtdCmpEmb * tmpPedQtd &Varchar = toformattedString(&tmpPedQtd) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&Varchar, &Varchar) &tmpPedQtdVarchar += ' X '+ &tmpProQtdCmpEmbVarchar.Trim() + ' ('+&Varchar.Trim() + ')' Else &tmpPedQtd = tmpPedQtd / (tmpProQtdCmpEmb) &Varchar = toformattedString(&tmpPedQtd) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&Varchar, &Varchar) &tmpPedQtdVarchar += ' / '+ &tmpProQtdCmpEmbVarchar.Trim() + ' (' +&Varchar.Trim() + ')' Endif EndIf &tmpProNom.TooltipText = tmpProNomERP /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &Editar = !'' &editarProdFornecedor = !'' &Lotes = !'' &auxMensagem = trim(tmpProNomERP) &tmpProNom = &auxMensagem &auxMensagem = trim(tmpProForCod)+'- '+trim(tmpProNom) &tmpProForCodNom = &auxMensagem &tmpPedVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUnt Do Case Case tmpProCod <> 0 &GridBadge = format(!"", "Vinculado com Produto do ERP") Case tmpProCod = 0 &GridBadge = format(!"", "Produto ainda não cadastrado") Otherwise &GridBadge = '' EndCase &tmpProRef.ColumnClass = iif(&ProSts = Status_Produto.INativo, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') Do Case Case tmpProSolLot = SolicitarLote.NAO_CONTROLAR tmpProSolLot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfoLight WWColumnTagInfoLightSingleCell' Case tmpProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR tmpProSolLot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise tmpProSolLot.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase &tmpNcmCodWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &tmpNcmCodWithTags = trim(tmpNcmCod.ToFormattedString()) If tmpNcmCod <> tmpProNcmCod &tmpNcmCodWithTags = format(!"", "NCM Difere do cadastro vinculado.") + &tmpNcmCodWithTags EndIf If tmpNcmCod = tmpProNcmCod &tmpNcmCodWithTags = format(!"", "NCM é igual do cadastro vinculado. ") + &tmpNcmCodWithTags EndIf If tmpProNcmCod = 0 or tmpProNcmCod = 99 &tmpNcmCodWithTags = format(!"", "NCM nao informado no vinculo do produto. ") + &tmpNcmCodWithTags EndIf &tmpNfeProBarWithTags = tmpNfeProBar If tmpNfeProBar <> tmpProBar and tmpNfeProBar <> 'SEM GTIN' &tmpNfeProBarWithTags = format(!"", "EAN Difere do produto vinculado.") + &tmpNfeProBarWithTags EndIf If tmpNfeProBar = tmpProBar OR tmpNfeProBar = 'SEM GTIN' &tmpNfeProBarWithTags = format(!"", "EAN do produto vinculado igual do fornecedor") + &tmpNfeProBarWithTags EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &tmpProForCodNom.TooltipText = tmpProNom if &ProSts = Status_ativoInativo.ATIVO &tmpProRef.TooltipText = '' Else &tmpProRef.TooltipText = 'Produto Inativado' Endif If (&TCon148_ControleLote = 'S') &Lotes.Visible = True tmpProSolLot.Visible = true Else &Lotes.Visible = false tmpProSolLot.Visible = false Endif EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' ImportarXmlCompra(!'Produtos', !'Totais', false) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else prcValidaTemporariaNota.Call(&tmpNFeCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) If &IsErro = false &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) ImportarXmlCompra(!'Produtos', !'GravaNf', false) Else msg(&Mensagem) TableMsg.Visible = True EndIf EndIf EndEvent Event 'WizardPrevious' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' ImportarXmlCompra(!'Produtos', !'Envolvidos', true) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Editar.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Editar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Editar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpnotatemporariaproduto.Create(tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Editar_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAlterarOperacao' wpAlterarOperacao.Popup(&EmpCod, &tmpNFeCod) ImportarXmlCompra(!'Envolvidos', !'Produtos', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoGravarTodos' WpGravarTodosProdutos.Popup(&tmpNFeCod) refresh keep /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Produtos.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Produtos.FilCod &tmpNFeCod = &WizardData.Produtos.tmpNFeCod &tmpEmixCod = &WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixCod &Mensagem = &WizardData.Produtos.Mensagem &MostrarPendentes = &WizardData.Produtos.MostrarPendentes &NfeChv = &WizardData.Produtos.NfeChv &ForCNPJ = &WizardData.Produtos.ForCNPJ &tmpEmixNom = &WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixNom /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &tmpNFeCod = &WizardData.Produtos.tmpNFeCod &tmpEmixCod = &WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixCod &tmpEmixNom = &WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixNom if &WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixNom.Length() > 20 &tmpEmixNom.TooltipText = &WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixNom &tmpEmixNom = gxGetMLi(&WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixNom, 1, 20) Endif &ForCNPJ = &WizardData.Produtos.ForCNPJ &NfeChv = &WizardData.Produtos.NfeChv &MostrarPendentes = &WizardData.Produtos.MostrarPendentes &Mensagem = &WizardData.Produtos.Mensagem EndIf EndSub Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Produtos.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Produtos.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Produtos.tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod &WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixCod = &tmpEmixCod &WizardData.Produtos.Mensagem = &Mensagem &WizardData.Produtos.MostrarPendentes = &MostrarPendentes &WizardData.Produtos.NfeChv = &NfeChv &WizardData.Produtos.ForCNPJ = &ForCNPJ &WizardData.Produtos.tmpEmixNom = &tmpEmixNom &WizardData.Produtos.Grid.Clear() For Each Line in Grid &GridItem = new() &GridItem.tmpProRef = &tmpProRef &GridItem.tmpProNom = &tmpProNom &GridItem.tmpProForCodNom = &tmpProForCodNom &GridItem.tmpEntCFOP = &tmpEntCFOP &GridItem.tmpProQtdCmpEmbVarchar = &tmpProQtdCmpEmbVarchar &GridItem.tmpPedQtdVarchar = &tmpPedQtdVarchar &GridItem.tmpPedVlrUnt = &tmpPedVlrUnt &WizardData.Produtos.Grid.Add(&GridItem) EndFor &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIf EndSub Event &tmpProNom.Click Produtos.Popup('RETURN', TrnMode.Update, &EmpCod, tmpProCod, '') Refresh keep EndEvent Event &Lotes.Click If tmpProSolLot = Status_SimNao.Nao Msg('Produto não controla Lote!') EndIf EndEvent Event &editarProdFornecedor.Click &WizardDataEditarFornecedor = new() &WizardDataEditarFornecedor.editaItem.tmpNFeCod = tmpNFeCod &WizardDataEditarFornecedor.editaItem.tmpNfeItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod &WebSession.Set('wpEditarProdFornecedor_Data', &WizardDataEditarFornecedor.ToJson()) wpEditarProdFornecedor.Popup('BemVindo', 'BemVindo', false) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'loadTemporaria' For Each Order tmpNFeCod WHere tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod RetornaNomeTipoLancamento.Call(&EmpCod, tmpLctCod, &LctNom) btnAlterarOperacao.Caption = &LctNom btnAlterarOperacao.TooltipText = 'Clique para trocar Tipo lançamento' if tmpPedCliCnpj.IsEmpty() &ForCNPJ = tmpPedCliCpf Else &ForCNPJ = tmpPedCliCnpj EndIF &NfeChv = tmpNfeChv &tmpEmixCod = tmpEmixCod &tmpEmixNom = tmpEmixNom if tmpEmixNom.Length() > 20 &tmpEmixNom.TooltipText = tmpEmixNom &tmpEmixNom = gxGetMLi(tmpEmixNom, 1, 20) Endif &LctCod = tmpLctCod Exit EndFor EndSub
